basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 80 Faculty Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website aiimsnagpur.edu.in. A total of 80 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Nagpur Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Professor/Additional Professor: Maximum 58 years Associate Professor & Assistant Professor: Maximum 50 years Retired Faculty: Up to 70 years Age Relaxation: OBC: 3 years, SC/ST: 5 years, PwD: 10 years, Central Govt servants / Ex-servicemen: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh, PhD (for non-medical like Biochemistry), Teaching/Research Experience
qualification.details: Professor: MBBS + MD/MS (broad specialty) or DM/MCh (super-specialty) + 14 years teaching experience Additional Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 10 years teaching experience Associate Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 6 years teaching experience Assistant Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 3 years teaching experience

salary_details.details: Professor: Level-14A ₹1,68,900 – 2,20,400 Additional Professor: Level-13A2+ ₹1,48,200 – 2,11,400 Associate Professor: Level-13A1+ ₹1,38,300 – 2,09,200 Assistant Professor: Level-12 ₹1,01,500 – 1,67,400

selection_process: Shortlisting based on bio-data / Search-cum-Selection Committee Interview Document verification Medical fitness
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
